description: it is not correctly tracking running agents, you see when i swap proects it works, but when im on all projects it does not. Also it should keep the default branches and or last branch visited. swapping projects should not cause a load most of the time and should only change the view not the actual data, unless swapping to non default branch the first time in this session. Running agents should be a drop down thing at top to the right of deploy.  Agent runner thats accessed with a should be removed and added to kanban view, the currenty tasks should be taking up like only 35% the space there currently taking but i should be able to expand task to right and agent runner to the left so i can focus on what i want. they should support 2 types, fully closed and you need to click the button to open again, or dynamically open where you can drag the bar that seperate them.
title: Fix agent tracking and redesign task/agent layout with collapsible panels
